title: Xtra Crispy Portuguese Vegetable Skewers
description: A fresh and crispy Portuguese dish featuring a variety of vegetables marinated in red wine vinegar, perfect for a flexitarian diet. This recipe is easy to make and serves as a great snack or side dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the cut vegetables to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the vegetables marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated vegetables onto bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a bamboo tray lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
